neighborhoods.name: East Nashville / Germantown
neighborhoods.description: Hip neighborhoods across the river with craft cocktails, murals, and Nashville's creative class

housing.predominantType: Renovated bungalows, modern townhomes, and apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Nashville. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Green Hills / Belle Meade
neighborhoods.description: Affluent southern neighborhoods with The Mall at Green Hills, tree-lined streets, and country music estates
neighborhoods.character: Affluent, The Mall, country music estates

housing.predominantType: Estate homes, traditional houses, and luxury condos

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Nashville's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Antioch / Hermitage
neighborhoods.description: Southeastern communities with diverse populations, affordable housing, and improving amenities

housing.predominantType: Ranch houses, townhomes, and apartment complexes

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Franklin / Brentwood
neighborhoods.description: Williamson County suburbs with top schools, historic downtown Franklin, and Civil War heritage
neighborhoods.character: Top schools, historic Franklin, Civil War heritage

housing.predominantType: Single-family homes in established and newer communities

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
